name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, title loans up to $4,000, and lines of credit up to $4,000 with in-store application and same-day funding options.
description_long:
Speedy Cash is a storefront lender operating multiple locations across Tennessee and other states, with this Memphis location at 5126 Summer Avenue offering in-person lending services. The company specializes in short-term personal lending products designed for consumers needing quick access to cash, positioning itself as a neighborhood alternative to traditional banks. The company emphasizes rapid approval and funding timelines, with the tagline 'Tomorrow can be payday®' and online application options available alongside in-store services. Speedy Cash operates extended hours (9am-7pm most weekdays) to accommodate working customers.

Speedy Cash offers three primary lending products: payday loans up to $425 with repayment due on or around the next paycheck, lines of credit up to $4,000 allowing flexible borrowing and repayment over time, and title loans up to $4,000 using vehicle collateral. The Memphis location also provides ancillary money services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and Green Dot prepaid card services. Applicants can begin applications online or complete them entirely in-store with assistance from staff, who review loan terms and answer questions throughout the process.

Speedy Cash distinguishes itself through multiple accessibility features: extended retail hours, bilingual customer service (English at 1-888-333-1360 and Spanish at 1-855-734-0111), transparent fee disclosure prior to signing, and hybrid application options (online start or in-store completion). The company provides detailed pre-visit guidance about required documentation and what to expect during application. Multiple Memphis-area locations (9 stores listed nearby) provide geographic convenience. The in-store experience emphasizes personal service and customer education about loan terms.

A significant caveat is that Speedy Cash's loan products carry the structural characteristics of high-cost short-term lending: payday loans carry implied triple-digit APRs given typical fee structures, title loans require vehicle collateral with repossession risk, and even the 'line of credit' product includes interest charges on drawn balances. While the company provides transparency about costs pre-signature, these remain expensive borrowing options compared to traditional credit. The maximum loan amounts ($425 payday, $4,000 secured) are modest and insufficient for major financial emergencies. No APR, fee schedule, or renewal terms are disclosed on the website itself.
address: 4209 E Lancaster Ave, Fort Worth, TX 76103

company_info.headquarters: 4209 E Lancaster Ave, Fort Worth, TX 76103

pros: Transparent fee disclosure before signing loan agreement required
Multiple application channels: online start, in-store completion, or hybrid options
Extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays, Saturday hours) accommodates working customers
Bilingual customer service available in English and Spanish
In-store staff assist with application process and answer questions throughout
Nine Memphis-area locations provide geographic convenience
Line of credit product allows flexible borrowing up to $4,000 limit rather than lump sum
Ancillary money services (check cashing, wire transfers, money orders) available same-location
cons: Payday loans carry high implied APR (typical $15-20 per $100 borrowed = 156-260% APR)
Title loans require vehicle collateral with risk of repossession if loan defaults
Maximum loan amounts modest ($425 payday, $4,000 title/LOC) — insufficient for major expenses
No APR, fee schedule, renewal terms, or default consequences disclosed on website
Line of credit product structure not clearly explained (trigger for debt cycling risk)
best_for: Consumers needing $100-$425 for immediate expenses before next paycheck with ability to repay in full
Vehicle owners needing $1,000-$4,000 in collateral-based loans who own their car outright
Customers who prefer in-person application assistance and real-time questions with staff
Banked consumers without access to credit card cash advances or overdraft options
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for employed consumers facing immediate cash shortfalls ($100-$425) between paychecks who can repay in full by next paycheck, or vehicle owners needing $1,000-$4,000 secured loans. The critical caveat is that all products carry high effective interest rates typical of short-term lenders; payday loans often exceed 150% APR and should only be used for genuine emergencies with confirmed ability to repay on schedule to avoid debt cycling.
services: Green Dot Visa debit card services
Vehicle appraisal for title loan collateral
